enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In En Peru Meenakumari, the protagonist expresses his love and admiration for his beloved, drawing parallels to the beauty of a goddess. The song is a celebration of romance, filled with vibrant imagery and heartfelt emotions. Set against the backdrop of Kandhasamy, it enhances the narrative of love and longing. The lively tune and engaging lyrics evoke feelings of joy and affection, making it a perfect addition to any romantic occasion.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Peru Meenakumari from the movie Kandhasamy is a delightful romantic number that showcases the enchanting vocals of Malathy. With the vibrant music composed by Devi Sri Prasad, this song captures the essence of love and celebration. Dive into the melodious world of this track that perfectly complements the film's lively spirit!
stanzaMeanings: I will tell you about love, my dear. Like a golden statue, I will make your heart flutter.
My name is Meenakumari, my town is Kanyakumari. Like a horse ride, we will enjoy the celebration.
I sing and sing, beautiful girl, you touch and touch, you shine.
My name is Meenakumari, my town is Kanyakumari. If you talk about love, it will make your heart flutter like a golden statue.
Oh my girl, rock it away. Peppy girl, shake it away. Look, your body is moving away. Girl, freak it away.
You say, 'Shakalakka makka.' Everybody is pushing away. Oh my baby, squeeze it away. Baby, get him away.
Touching, touching, my dear. Talking about love, oh my dear.
In the vegetable garden, I am a chili. In the English style, I am January. My dear, love... In the dark, I am a river. In the feast, I am a king. Touching, touching, touching, touching...
I came with a unique look. Oh my dear, all beauty is my face.
My name is Meenakumari, my town is Kanyakumari. If you talk about love, it will make your heart flutter like a golden statue.
In the sweet shop, I am a century. In the fruit, I am a grape. My dear, love... In the flower, I am a flame. In the love scriptures, I am the first.
I left the honey and put in a little sugar. In my eyes, I have a knife for the girls.
My name is Meenakumari, my town is Kanyakumari. Like a horse ride, we will enjoy the celebration.
